form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Last start 3rd of 8 at Port Macquarie Cg&E Cl1 on March 24 over 1200m, slow going 2 len behind Patrioticintention carrying 59.5kg at $2.90. The race before that favourite; tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 2.25 len at Wyong Super Mdn February 21 over 1100m defeating Frostisen carrying 54.5kg at $5.50. SCRATCHED.
